refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle allows focused design and verification of each segment, improving clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each sub-phase (load, travel, dump) under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase duration to meet load time target
Minimize travel phase duration to meet travel time target
Minimize dump phase duration to meet dump time target

candidate_dps: Optimize load operation via automated control and scheduling
Optimize travel path and speed using dynamic routing and vehicle control
Optimize dump operation through precise positioning and timing
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize load operation via automated control and scheduling; Optimize travel path and speed using dynamic routing and vehicle control; Optimize dump operation through precise positioning and timing

potential_sources: Interdependency between load and travel timing
Coordination between travel and dump positioning
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but require interface coordination; manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate telemetry and tasking data availability
Risk of timing delays due to network latency or operator intervention
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit interface definitions between phases to reduce coupling risk.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for cycle time optimization including vehicle control, teleoperation, and safety coordination

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time vehicle and environment data for cycle time optimization

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets from higher-level planning

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Coordinates safety-critical alerts impacting cycle operations

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Enables communication between vehicle, teleoperation, and safety services

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as it integrates all cycle time optimization functions; low diffusion risk.
Contains vehicle control but lacks teleoperation and safety coordination; moderate diffusion risk.
Supports operator intervention but not full cycle optimization; higher diffusion risk.
Focused on safety alerts, minimal containment of cycle time functions; high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves coordination across phases.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple functions
Risk of interface overload if external interfaces are not well managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Potential interface overload on Telemetry and Network Link
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows strong containment scores and low diffusion risk compared to alternatives.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and cycle time measurements aggregated at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization responsibility to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface definitions to reduce potential overload
Consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution for maintainability

decision.justification: Current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet criteria with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize load phase duration to meet load time target
Minimize travel phase duration to meet travel time target
Minimize dump phase duration to meet dump time target

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry and tasking data are reliable and timely
Network link supports required communication bandwidth and latency
open_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating cycle time improvements
Interface performance metrics under operational conditions
